[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111111111 a
1 1111111111 a
2 1111111111 a
3 1111111111 a
4 1101001010 5
5 1011000000 3
6 0110110111 7
7 0110111111 8
